name: Flow Cytometry Surface Staining

components.name: 3. Fc Block (人: Human TruStain; 鼠: anti-CD16/32)

nameCn: 流式细胞术表面染色流程

notes.en: For intracellular staining: fix with 4% PFA 20 min, then permeabilize with 0.1% saponin. Titrate each antibody individually. Compensation controls required.
notes.zh: 胞内染色需先固定 (4% PFA 20 min) 再透化 (0.1% saponin)。每个抗体需单独滴度实验。compensation controls 必需。FMO controls 用于 gating。

ref: Cossarizza et al. (2019) Eur J Immunol 49:1457–1973; Perfetto et al. (2004) Nat Rev Immunol 4:648–655
